activity_zone_items.name: Shallow pool-like structure
activity_zone_items.specifics: Light gray floor, white walls, light blue section on right wall

activity_zone_items.name: Blue buckets
activity_zone_items.specifics: Used for scooping and transferring toys; at least two visible on right side of pool near light blue wall; one brought in by a woman in white top

activity_zone_items.name: Small colorful toys
activity_zone_items.specifics: Contained within the white bins; colors unspecified beyond 'colorful'

activity_zone_items.name: Small dark-colored objects
activity_zone_items.specifics: Scattered on the pool floor; color described as dark; type unspecified

activity_zone_items.name: Glass barrier
activity_zone_items.specifics: Separates the pool area from the green artificial grass area

activity_zone_items.name: Green artificial grass area
activity_zone_items.specifics: Located on the left side of the pool, decorated with marine-themed cutouts (starfish, fish, coral)

activity_zone_items.name: Marine-themed cutouts
activity_zone_items.specifics: Starfish, fish, and coral designs; decorating the artificial grass area

activity_zone_items.name: Steps
activity_zone_items.specifics: Used to descend into the play area

other_items_in_room.name: Mobile phone (used for photos)
other_items_in_room.location: Held by one of the adults in the play area; possibly not part of the play materials

notes: Water is implied by the context (water play activity, pool-like structure, sensory play descriptions) but is never explicitly confirmed as present in the observations. The exact number of blue buckets is slightly ambiguous — at least two are visible at the start and at least one more is brought in later. The small dark-colored objects on the pool floor are not identified by type. Marine-themed cutouts are on the grass area adjacent to the pool rather than inside it, but are part of the overall activity zone setup.
